message:
feat(landing): add Quality Assurance section standalone component

Standalone implementation of research hygiene section (bead f8vs.4 was
already implemented in page.tsx, but this provides a reusable component):
- Coach Mode with three progression levels
- Prediction Lock to prevent hindsight bias
- Calibration Tracking for accuracy monitoring
- Confound Detection across research domains
- Artifact Linting with 50+ research hygiene rules
- Comparison table (without vs with guardrails)

Includes 6 passing tests.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
